name: grok-it
description: Codex plugin that exposes Grok x_search, image generation, and video generation through a local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Use Grok X search, image, and video tools in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Grok It bundles a shared cross-platform plugin root with a local MCP server and skill guidance so Claude Code and Codex agents can call Grok OAuth or xAI API-key backed X search, image generation, and video generation tools.
defaultPrompt: Search X with Grok for recent context.
Generate a short video with Grok.
